game_info.title: added-random-barriers
game_info.concept:
Mario Kart Tour is a racing game where players use one-finger controls to steer, drift, and deploy items to win races. Core mechanics involve collecting power-ups from item boxes and activating Frenzy mode for a short period of unlimited items and invincibility. Progression is driven by earning Grand Stars from races to unlock new drivers, karts, and gliders via a featured pipe system, alongside collecting badges for completing challenges. The game features bi-weekly "tours" that introduce new city-inspired courses and character variations, alongside bonus challenge courses with unique objectives like "Vs. Mega Bowser." Players compete against up to seven other players globally in customizable multiplayer races, striving to increase their online rank through high scores.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/mario-kart-tour/id1293634699?uo=4

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

■Challenge players worldwide in multiplayer!
You can race against up to seven other players, whether they're registered as in-game friends, nearby, or scattered around the world.

Multiplayer races can be customized with a variety of rules, such as individual or team races, kart speed, and number of item slots. You can play however you want!

■ Mario Kart takes a world tour!
Mario and friends go global in this new Mario Kart as they race around courses inspired by real-world cities in addition to classic Mario Kart courses! These destinations will be featured in tours that rotate every two weeks! In addition to courses based on iconic locales, some of your favorite Mario Kart characters will get variations that incorporate the local flavor of cities featured in the game!

■ Endless Mario Kart fun at your fingertips!
The Mario Kart series known and loved by many is ready to take the world by storm – one smart device at a time! With just one finger, you can steer and drift with ease and sling devastating items as you go for the gold in cups filled with new and classic Mario Kart courses.

■ Nab 1st place with items and Frenzy mode!
In Mario Kart Tour you have access to an arsenal of powerful items that can mix things up on the racetrack! Turn up the heat by activating the new Frenzy mode, which gives an unlimited supply of a certain item and makes you invincible! Make the most of the ensuing chaos, as Frenzy mode only lasts a short time!

■ Collect drivers, karts, badges, and more!
Earn Grand Stars by racing or fire off the featured pipe to receive more drivers, karts, and gliders! You can also proudly display badges, earned by completing certain challenges, next to your in-game name!

■ Bonus challenge courses put a twist on traditional races!
In certain races, 1st place isn't always the goal. With names like "Vs. Mega Bowser" and "Goomba Takedown," these bonus challenge courses demand a different approach to gameplay and strategy!

■ Race to increase your online rank!
Boost with the best of 'em! Your high scores will determine how you compare to other players all over the world. Keep practicing and trying out different combinations of drivers, karts, and gliders to increase your score and rise to the top!

Note: A Nintendo Account is required to play Mario Kart Tour.

* Free-to-start; optional in-game purchases available. Persistent Internet, compatible smartphone, and Nintendo Account required. Data charges may apply.
* For information about our ads, please see the “How we use your information” section of the Nintendo Privacy Policy.
* May include advertising.

© 2019 Nintendo
Mario Kart is a trademark of Nintendo.
game_info.description: Kart Tour 3D is a high-speed arcade racing game where you compete against AI opponents on a procedurally generated city track. Master the art of drifting to maintain speed through tight corners and utilize power-ups found in mystery boxes to gain an advantage. Race through 3 laps to claim the Gold Cup. Watch out for hazards and manage your speed to stay on the road!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Up / W: Accelerate
- Arrow Down / S: Brake / Reverse
- Arrow Left / A: Steer Left
- Arrow Right / D: Steer Right
- Space: Use Item / Horn
- Shift: Drift (Hold while turning for tighter turns)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause Game
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player acceleration and movement physics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: In TEST_1 mode, simulate holding the accelerate key (W) for 2 seconds. Monitor the player's velocity and position change.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player velocity should increase from 0 to a positive value, and position should change significantly from the starting coordinate along the track direction.

TEST_1.expected: Player velocity should increase from 0 to a positive value, and position should change significantly from the starting coordinate along the track direction.

TEST_2.strategy_description: In TEST_2 mode, force the player to steer perpendicularly off the track. Monitor speed when distance from track center exceeds track width.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player speed should decrease rapidly (high drag) when the "off-road" state is detected compared to on-road acceleration.
TEST_2.strategy: In TEST_2 mode, force the player to steer perpendicularly off the track. Monitor speed when distance from track center exceeds track width.
TEST_2.expected: Player speed should decrease rapidly (high drag) when the "off-road" state is detected compared to on-road acceleration.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify Item Box collision and item acquisition.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Place an ItemBox directly in front of the player. Drive player forward. Check player's item inventory state.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: ItemBox should disappear (be removed from scene/active list) and player's item slot should fill with a random item type.
TEST_3.description: Verify Item Box collision and item acquisition.
TEST_3.strategy: Place an ItemBox directly in front of the player. Drive player forward. Check player's item inventory state.
TEST_3.expected: ItemBox should disappear (be removed from scene/active list) and player's item slot should fill with a random item type.

TEST_4.strategy_description: Teleport player just before the finish line and simulate forward movement to cross it. Monitor currentLap counter.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Current Lap should increment by 1 when crossing the start/finish line geometry in the correct direction.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Initialize AI opponents. Run game loop for 60 frames. Check if AI positions have changed from spawn points.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: AI entities should have non-zero velocity and displaced positions following the track path.

TEST_6.strategy_description: Set current lap to 3 and distance to finish line to 0. Simulate crossing the line.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Game phase should transition to "GAME_OVER_WIN" if player position is 1st, or "GAME_OVER_LOSE" otherwise.

TEST_7.strategy_description: During PLAYING phase, simulate ESC key press. Check gamePhase variable. Simulate ESC again.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: GamePhase should toggle between "PLAYING" and "PAUSED". Delta time updates should stop or be ignored during pause.
